name: Copy the top-decile wallets (non-persistence)
note: top-decile train-ROI loses -$90,457 OOS; trainROI->OOSreturn r=-0.001; surrogate p=0.528

name: Copy-trading persistence across 5 walk-forward windows
note: surrogate p in {0.495,0.795,0.164,0.376,0.577}; Stouffer z=-0.13 (no aggregate skill)

name: Copy-trading robustness deepenings (eligibility thresholds)
note: robust across eligibility thresholds, p=0.43-0.63

name: CR27 pre-registered human-like wallet stratum (frozen forward)
note: reached PROMISING in-sample; KILL under family-wise correction on the frozen forward window

name: High-win-rate cohort profile (the longshot-seller anti-signal)
note: 70%+ win-rate selects longshot-sellers (win often, lose big); the win-rate filter is the anti-signal

name: Calibration / favorite-longshot fade (clean-binary, unified gauntlet)
note: clean-binary n=402; structure real but DSR=0.187@N=20, surrogate p=0.052, holdout fails; KILL at every cost

name: CR28 pre-registered single-config calibration (frozen forward)
note: single frozen config scored on the forward window

name: Cross-category favorite-longshot slope (family-wise MAX)
note: geopolitics fl_slope=0.036, n=59; binds on net_of_cost

name: Calibration-verdict robustness across knobs/strata
note: KILL holds across strata; verdict not a lucky-selection artifact

name: RE22 keystone — aggregate calibration (on-winner gap vs price-tied null)
note: entire corpus on-winner gap +0.0001 over 1.36M trades (market calibrated; the RE agent's 0.889 was wrong)

name: negRisk basket riskless arbitrage scan
note: 579 baskets, median sum(ask)=1.073 (+7.3% overround); you pay the vig, not collect it

name: Overround decomposition (void-avoidance vs upset-tail premium)
note: 574 baskets, void-avoidance cost=0; overround concentrates in cheap longshot legs = favorite-longshot premium, harvestable only by shorting (= the killed fade)

name: Portfolio / risk-management gauntlet (sizing-invariance)
note: flat / fixed-fraction / Kelly / Martingale / anti-Martingale / D'Alembert / vol-target / max-loss-cap — no scheme rescues a <=0 edge; expectancy sign is sizing-invariant

name: RE13 staleness / momentum mechanism
note: surrogate p=1.0

name: RE10 forecasting mechanism
note: templates and the tradeable band are near-disjoint; not $0-decidable

name: Volume-spike momentum
note: net of 2c round-trip all configs negative; surrogate p=1.000 (no better than time-shuffle)

name: Weather forecast pre-registered forward test (CR29)
note: Brier market 0.0838 < Open-Meteo ensemble forecast 0.0953; the crowd beats a real forecast

name: Weather edge (buy side)
note: no cost-survivable forecast edge on the buy side

name: Weather edge (sell side)
note: no cost-survivable forecast edge on the sell side

name: Planted-edge positive control (delta=0.08)
note: the gauntlet SURVIVEs a planted +8% per-bet edge — proves the harness has detection power

name: Zero-edge negative control (delta=0)
note: the gauntlet KILLs a 0% edge — detection floor ~5-8%
